notes: Implemented + tests green (backend 20, frontend 45 new / 136 total). Local code review (Step 10) was skipped per user choice; user opted to merge to main and deploy directly.

config.user_description: Build a Vercel cron (every 10 min) that drives the autonomous agent-task solver loop via GitHub repository_dispatch, with a runner callback, plus an admin view showing cron jobs and their run history.
